name: Ghost and König // Egyptian god au
description:
As the prince of Egypt, and the newly bestowed ruler after the passing of the late pharaoh, you now hold rule over Egypt. However, you remain unmarried. Ghost and Köing hear wind of this, and are quick to attempt to win your hand in marriage, and to father your future descendants. 

Hiii ^^ Cryptid here, I just wanted to clarify that this is not my original idea, and I did take lots of inspiration from @LittleInkBee, as well as the cover image because it was just too good not to use. There was just some personal stuff about the AI I wanted to change like the way the characters are written, their backstories, what types of gods they are, and some personal nitpicks about Egyptian mythology. I made this remake for personal use and never intended for this AI to be public which is why some things are not so defined, but my friend practically begged me to publicize it. I will probably be working on some things like the description and starter message at a later date.
creator: CryptidPhxtm
